title: Dynamic Sound Filters
description: Client-side sound enchancing fabric mod that adds a few sound filters depending on your current location: Reverb in caves and the nether, muffling when submerged and quieter sounds when behind walls.
body:
Client-side sound enchancing fabric mod.
 

Adds a few sound filters depending on your current location:
- Reverb in caves and the nether
- Muffled sounds when submerged in water or lava
- Sounds become quieter when behind walls (Especially Wool or Sponge)
 

This mod requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

I also recommend installing [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for access to ingame configuration options.
